window_expansion_note: Google IO keynote May 19 spans strict window boundary; IO content and product availability continued May 19-21. 5-day effective window used.

items.title: MCP protocol release candidate published, stateless core arrives
key_claims: Stateless protocol core: initialize handshake and Mcp-Session-Id removed
MCP Apps: server-rendered HTML in sandboxed iframes
Tasks extension formalized for long-running async workflows
Auth hardening aligned to OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect
Minimum 12-month deprecation window established
Roots, Sampling, Logging deprecated

items.title: Google I/O: Gemini 3.5 Flash reaches GA, Antigravity 2.0 launches as standalone agent platform
items.caveats: All benchmark scores vendor-claimed or Google-affiliated. Independent evaluator Artificial Analysis finds model 5.5x costlier than Gemini 3 Flash and underperforming on MRCR/ARC-AGI-2.
key_claims: Price: $1.50 input / $9.00 output per 1M tokens (vendor-primary)
Speed: 4x faster on output tokens than comparable frontier models (vendor-claimed)
Wins 11 of 15 benchmarks vs Gemini 3.1 Pro (vendor-measured)
Antigravity 2.0: desktop app, CLI, SDK, Managed Agents API
Single API call provisions sandboxed Linux agent environment

conflict.description: Vendor benchmark claims vs Artificial Analysis independent evaluation
conflict.resolution: Vendor benchmarks T4 for comparative claims; independent reviewer T3. Agentic improvements over own prior generation appear genuine; cost-competitiveness with GPT-5.5/Claude Opus needs independent validation.

items.title: WebMCP enters Chrome 149 origin trial as open standard for browser-native agent tools
items.caveats: Origin trial only. Firefox and Safari have not committed to adoption. Standard may change before ratification.
key_claims: Origin trial starts in Chrome 149
No backend MCP server required for participating pages
Gemini in Chrome will 'soon' support WebMCP (intent, not commitment)

items.title: Gemini Spark personal AI agent starts US beta for AI Ultra subscribers
items.caveats: Beta, US-only, AI Ultra plan ($200/month) required. Execution scope and guardrails not fully disclosed. Beta date is stated intent.
key_claims: Integrates with Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Slides, Canva, OpenTable, Instacart
Cloud-based: continues tasks after device is closed
Beta to US AI Ultra subscribers week of 26 May (stated intent)

items.title: Grok adds Vercel, Canva, Gamma, and S&P Global connectors
items.fetch_note: Primary returned 403; confirmed via xAI Docs connector catalog and multiple T3 sources
key_claims: Vercel, Canva, Gamma, S&P Global connectors live May 22
Custom MCP server connection supported
Prior connectors: Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, Notion, GitHub, Linear

items.title: OpenAI adopts C2PA and SynthID watermarking, releases public Verify tool
items.fetch_note: Primary returned 403; confirmed via TechCrunch with OpenAI confirmation
items.caveats: Verify tool detects only OpenAI-generated content at launch. Research preview — no production SLA.
key_claims: C2PA metadata embedded in all ChatGPT, Codex, API images
SynthID invisible watermark: survives screenshots, resizing, lossy compression (Google DeepMind claim)
Verify tool: free, research preview, public upload

items.title: OpenAI model disproves Erdős 80-year geometry conjecture, checked by external mathematicians
items.fetch_note: Primary returned 403; confirmed via TechCrunch and multiple corroborating sources
items.caveats: Expert confirmation, not formal peer review. Model not publicly released. Disproves square-grid sub-conjecture, not the full Erdős unit-distance problem.
key_claims: Construction uses Golod-Shafarevich theory and infinite class field towers
Achieves n^(1+delta) unit-distance pairs for fixed delta > 0
Princeton's Will Sawin refined exponent to delta = 0.014
Proof reviewed by a group of external mathematicians

items.title: Anthropic Project Glasswing finds 10,000+ critical vulnerabilities in first month
items.caveats: All counts Anthropic-reported. Mozilla 10x claim vs unspecified baseline model. Mythos Preview not publicly available.
key_claims: 10,000+ high/critical bugs across ~50 partners in month 1
90.6% of 1,752 independently assessed vulnerabilities confirmed genuine
Cloudflare: 2,000 bugs, 400 high/critical, fewer false positives than conventional testing
Mozilla: 271 vulnerabilities in Firefox 150
Open source: 6,202 estimated high/critical out of 23,019 total across 1,000+ projects

items.title: Hark raises $700M Series A at $6B valuation to build personal AI hardware platform
items.fetch_note: BusinessWire returned 503; confirmed via Brett Adcock X post (T2 self-disclosure) and TechCrunch
key_claims: $700M raised, $6B post-money valuation
Led by Parkway Venture Capital
Strategic investors: Nvidia, AMD Ventures, Brookfield, Intel Capital, Qualcomm Ventures, Salesforce Ventures
~70 employees, NVIDIA B200 data center acquired
First foundation models expected summer 2026

items.title: Andrej Karpathy joins Anthropic pretraining team
items.caveats: CNBC with Anthropic spokesperson confirmation. Primary X post from Karpathy not directly retrieved.
key_claims: Reporting to pretraining lead Nick Joseph
Will start a team applying Claude to accelerate pretraining research
Previously: OpenAI co-founder, Tesla Autopilot/FSD lead, Eureka Labs founder
